name: 08_condition_met_high_count_still_hit
description: Condition met, count=10 -> 11. Well above threshold; hit remains True.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -5.0 <= -2.0 - 0.10 = -2.10 is TRUE. MC: 5.0 < 60.0 is TRUE. Condition met. new_count = 10 + 1 = 11. Hit = (11 >= 3) is True. Catches an impl that capped the count at 3 (would return 3 not 11) or an impl using `== 3` (would fail at count > 3).
